details: Dependency-confusion stub package. The preinstall and install hooks collect the installer's username, hostname, working directory, and package name, base64-encode them, and exfiltrate the data via HTTPS GET to callback[.]m0chan[.]co[.]uk and via DNS nslookup to the same domain. The package contains no real functionality — index.js is an empty stub (module.exports = {}). Dependency-confusion packages published under the @pimy-b2cweb scope at version 99.99.99. Both preinstall and install hooks collect system information (username, hostname, working directory, package name) via base64-encoded HTTPS GET requests and DNS lookups to callback[.]m0chan[.]co[.]uk. The hooks run curl and nslookup to exfiltrate the encoded data to the C2 domain.

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
